# Features — Aero HRM

## HR Essentials
- Employees: profiles, departments, designations
- Leaves: leave types, requests, approvals, bulk operations
- Timesheets: track hours, filter by date/employee
- Attendance: view, filter, export basics

## Productivity & UX
- Modern UI built with HeroUI + Tailwind v4
- Dark mode support across pages
- Powerful table filters, search, pagination
- Consistent modal, form, and toast patterns

## Security & Access
- RBAC permissions for HR roles
- Tenant isolation in SaaS mode (subdomain-based)

## Developer Friendly
- Laravel 11 + Inertia v2 architecture
- React 18 components for pages/forms/tables
- Clean service + controller patterns

## Roadmap
- Payroll integrations
- Advanced attendance devices
- More analytics dashboards
